ideal_must_detect.matched_text: Affected repositories included the virtual data room for Project AURORA (proposed acquisition of Morioka Robotics K.K.) and HR folder “Benefits_2026.”

Pending disclosure controls: treat the acquisition data as undisclosed enumerated material facts under FIEA and suspend all employee trading approvals and board member pre-clearances via the Insider List Portal.

Mitigation steps include resetting service credentials, disabling legacy Sango IDS bypass rules, rotating KikuDrive share links, and expediting the “A-17 APPI Data Minimization” policy review; any later patches would be closing the barn door after the horse has bolted.

must_detect.matched_text: Affected repositories included the virtual data room for Project AURORA (proposed acquisition of Morioka Robotics K.K.) and HR folder “Benefits_2026.”

Pending disclosure controls: treat the acquisition data as undisclosed enumerated material facts under FIEA and suspend all employee trading approvals and board member pre-clearances via the Insider List Portal.

Mitigation steps include resetting service credentials, disabling legacy Sango IDS bypass rules, rotating KikuDrive share links, and expediting the “A-17 APPI Data Minimization” policy review; any later patches would be closing the barn door after the horse has bolted.

Affected repositories included the virtual data room for Project AURORA (proposed acquisition of Morioka Robotics K.K.) and HR folder “Benefits_2026.”
Undisclosed materials possibly exfiltrated include draft tender-offer (TOB) terms (indicative price JPY 2,450 per share, planned launch window 2026-07-15) and a not-yet-public board resolution approving the schedule—facts deemed material under FIEA until disclosure.
The extraordinary board minutes included named voting records by directors and an internal note from Mr. Daichi Kurogane (CFO) regarding funding via a bridge line from Seisei Trust Bank and staggered settlement mechanics.
From HR data, files contain personal data under APPI, such as Ms. Keiko Yamada’s masked Individual Number (My Number, format ***-****-****), facial-recognition templates used for building entry, and genetic screening results (carrier status) from a voluntary wellness program—biometric and genetic categories.
Also present were care-leave applications identifying minor information for Master Riku Yamada (age 12), including vaccination certificates and school contact notes, and union dues auto-deduction records indicating Mr. Sora Iwaki’s membership in the Shin-Hikari Workers Union.
A subtle subset of calendars listed Ms. Keiko Yamada’s dialysis appointment reminders and temple roster entries for the Hōgetsu Fellowship, which combined may reveal health status and religious belief.
No payment card data was stored, but a folder of perks included Shin-Tama Comets baseball ticket allocations and travel itineraries for Akashima City, which are not sensitive but may aid social engineering.
We have notified the Higashi Capital Markets Surveillance Office and the Self-Regulatory Committee of the Shin-Tokyo Securities Association on a voluntary basis; a confidential inquiry from the exchange is anticipated.
Pending disclosure controls: treat the acquisition data as undisclosed enumerated material facts under FIEA and suspend all employee trading approvals and board member pre-clearances via the Insider List Portal.
Mitigation steps include resetting service credentials, disabling legacy Sango IDS bypass rules, rotating KikuDrive share links, and expediting the “A-17 APPI Data Minimization” policy review; any later patches would be closing the barn door after the horse has bolted.
Our DEI policy Inclusive Horizons reiterates that sexual orientation and religion are respected in the workplace, but this statement is general and not linked to any person.
For data subjects, contact channel is privacy@hoshizora-am.example.jp or +81-50-1234-0000; for investors, contact ir@hoshizora-am.example.jp.
Mr. Kurogane will convene an emergency call with outside counsel and the Independent Special Committee to assess whether a corrective disclosure is required prior to the planned AURORA timetable.
This report is internal to Hoshizora Advanced Materials K.K. and Morioka Robotics K.K., and not yet public; onward sharing to third parties including vendors of NimbusGate WAF shall be on a need-to-know basis.
